citations.desc: Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being.
citations.narrative:
The facility does have a written environmental enhancement plan but could not provide it at the time of inspection. Per a
facility representative, the plan does not include specific provisions for the individually housed African Grey that cannot
hear or see other birds. Without a well-developed and documented plan, social birds may develop illness or symptoms of
psychological distress when isolated from other birds of their kind or compatible species. The facility must develop,
document, and implement an adequate enrichment plan with the attending veterinarian's approval for all their birds,
including special attention regarding enhancement of the environment of those individually housed social species of birds
that are unable to see and hear birds of their own or compatible species. Correct by 04/09/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.154(c)(4) 
   
Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being. 
The facility does have a written environmental enhancement plan but could not provide it at the time of inspection. Per a 
facility representative, the plan does not include specific provisions for the individually housed African Grey that cannot 
hear or see other birds. Without a well-developed and documented plan, social birds may develop illness or symptoms of 
psychological distress when isolated from other birds of their kind or compatible species. The facility must develop, 
document, and implement an adequate enrichment plan with the attending veterinarian's approval for all their birds, 
including special attention regarding enhancement of the environment of those individually housed social species of birds 
that are unable to see and hear birds of their own or compatible species. Correct by 04/09/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
